iteration_1.notes: Baseline with verbose skill. sql-query stuck in loop: .import caused 'datatype mismatch' on CSV header row with typed table. Never produced query_results.json.

iteration_2.notes: Added CSV import guidance (Approach 1: INSERT, Approach 2: temp table). sql-query now works but: header row still imported as data via .import (contaminated results), top_customer saved as object instead of string, product_ranking saved as array of objects instead of strings. sql-migrate: project_hours array not sorted correctly in JSON output.

iteration_3.notes: Strengthened to 'CRITICAL: Do NOT use .import'. Added JSON output format rules (plain strings vs objects vs arrays). sql-query now perfect. sql-migrate: engineering_projects missing 'Gamma' due to broken nested json_group_array/json_object query.

iteration_4.notes: Added guidance to run simple queries separately instead of complex nested JSON in SQLite. Added DISTINCT join query pattern for filtered lists. Both tasks now perfect.

changes: Replaced verbose multi-database skill (SQLite/PostgreSQL/MySQL) with SQLite-only focused skill
Added CRITICAL warning against using .import (causes header row contamination)
Added step-by-step workflow at top of skill
Added JSON output format rules (string vs object vs array of strings vs array of objects)
Added write tool string-only content requirement
Added guidance to run queries separately instead of complex nested JSON in SQLite
Added DISTINCT filtered join query pattern for normalization tasks
Removed all PostgreSQL, MySQL, migration scripts, backup/restore, and EXPLAIN content
